title: isocoma sedoides
intro: Isocoma sedoides, also known as the yellow rabbitbrush or mountain rabbitbrush, is a flowering shrub native to the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating wounds, sore throats, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Isocoma sedoides include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and support immune system health. Herbal preparations of Isocoma sedoides can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or oil to create teas, tinctures, and salves for topical use.
